name: Laika
description: Laika — Security and compliance management platform automating SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA evidence collection and audits.

seo.title: Laika — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Laika: Laika — Security and compliance management platform automating SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA evidence collection and audits.

when_to_use: SOC 2 Type II readiness and audit management platform
ISO 27001 evidence collection with automated integrations
HIPAA compliance program management for health tech
Employee access review automation for security audits
Vendor risk assessment integrated with compliance posture

pros: Combines automation with human compliance advisors
Multi-framework coverage including HITRUST and PCI
Questionnaire and vendor risk modules bundled
cons: Acquired and rebranded — continuity questions linger
Pricing not friendly to seed-stage budgets
Integration list trails Vanta and Drata
Advisor quality can vary depending on assignment
review.verdict: A decent compliance platform with advisory glue on top — strategy changes post-acquisition make it a wait-and-see bet.
review.best_for: Mid-market teams tackling multiple frameworks with limited internal GRC staff
review.not_for: Startups prioritizing lowest price or most integrations

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
